seed.quote: Website stays independent — reference records only.

question: Which publication topology should this article's EN edition use, given the recorded position on the site?

candidates.answer: publish EN canonically on the site
keep EN as a reference record and syndicate the full text elsewhere
publish EN only on the syndication platforms, no site entry

seed.quote: report trust must be enforced by a mechanism that survives a bad prompt

question: The lesson names the mechanism but not why prompt discipline failed — what broke that made you record this?

candidates.answer: a reviewer noticed the omission by hand
a run shipped a report whose numbers no mechanism had checked
